1056.issue: [W1056] admin 7.6.17 listed as dependency but 7.6.20 is recommended. Please consider updating globalDependency at [io-package.json](https://github.com/schmupu/ioBroker.asterisk/blob/master/io-package.json).

1127.issue: [W1127] [io-package.json](https://github.com/schmupu/ioBroker.asterisk/blob/master/io-package.json): instanceObject "dialout.language" common.states must be number or string

2008.issue: [S2008] Version 2.0.3 tagged as "latest" at npm is not signed with provenance. Trusted publishing is recommended.

3014.issue: [S3014] Workflow "test-and-release.yml": job "adapter-tests" should declare "needs: check-and-lint" to run after linting.

3020.issue: [E3020] Workflow "test-and-release.yml": job "check-and-lint" uses node.js 20 which is below the minimum required version 22. Please update to node.js 24.

3022.issue: [E3022] Workflow "test-and-release.yml": job "deploy" uses node.js 20 which is below the minimum required version 24. Please update to node.js 24.

3032.issue: [W3032] Release 2.0.3 from [io-package.json](https://github.com/schmupu/ioBroker.asterisk/blob/master/io-package.json)/package.json has not yet been tagged. Tagging releases is required.

5005.issue: [S5005] Plain setTimeout() found in source files (src/lib/tools.ts). Please use this.setTimeout() or adapter.setTimeout() instead.

5043.issue: [S5043] Package "path" is a built-in Node.js module. Please use "node:path" instead.

5051.issue: [S5051] Custom sleep/wait function(s) found in source files (src/lib/tools.ts). Consider using the built-in "this.delay()" method provided by the ioBroker adapter base class instead.

5601.issue: [S5601] i18n directory "admin/i18n" uses long format ({lang}/translations.json). Consider migrating to short format ({lang}.json) using "npm run translate convert".

5612.issue: [W5612] "admin/jsonConfig.json/items/_ssh/items/ip" attribute "tooltip" uses key "SSH Server must run on Asterisk Server" which is not found in the English translation file at "admin/i18n/en".

6025.issue: [E6025] [README.md](https://github.com/schmupu/ioBroker.asterisk/blob/master/README.md) must contain exactly one H1 heading, but found 12.

8004.issue: [W8004] Please process PR [[#145] "[iobroker-bot] Add Dependabot Ignore Rule for @types/node Major Version Updates"](https://github.com/schmupu/ioBroker.asterisk/issues/145)

8005.issue: [S8005] No GitHub release found. Please use GitHub releases for easier identification of the current release and consider using "@iobroker/action-deploy".

8911.issue: [S8911] File "/.github/workflows/dependabot-auto-merge.yml" was found. Consider migrating to the new standard workflow "automerge-dependabot.yml".

8912.issue: [E8912] Automerge workflow file "/.github/workflows/dependabot-auto-merge.yml" uses deprecated action "ahmadnassri/action-dependabot-auto-merge" which no longer works. Please migrate to "iobroker-bot-orga/action-automerge-dependabot@v1".

8915.issue: [W8915] Dependabot npm entry (directory: "/") has no "cooldown" configured. A cooldown of at least 7 days (e.g. "cooldown: { default: 7 }") is recommended to reduce supply chain risk.

8917.issue: [W8917] At least major versions of @types/node should not be updated by dependabot. Please add ignore block at dependabot.yml.

0036.issue: [E0036] @alcalzone/release-script-plugin-manual-review 4.0.0 specified. 5.2.0 is required as minimum,  5.2.0 (or newer) is current. Please update devDependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/schmupu/ioBroker.asterisk/blob/master/package.json)

0082.issue: [S0082] Package "rimraf" (devDependencies) can be updated from 6.1.2 to 6.1.3. The newer version has been published for 99 days. Please evaluate updating [package.json](https://github.com/schmupu/ioBroker.asterisk/blob/master/package.json).

0028.issue: [W0028] Minimum node.js version 22 recommended. The current engines.node clause ">= 20" allows Node.js 20.0.0 as minimum. Please update it to require at least ">=22" at [package.json](https://github.com/schmupu/ioBroker.asterisk/blob/master/package.json).

0034.issue: [W0034] @iobroker/adapter-core 3.3.2 specified. 3.4.1 (or newer) is current. Please update dependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/schmupu/ioBroker.asterisk/blob/master/package.json)

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^24.10.1" at [package.json](https://github.com/schmupu/ioBroker.asterisk/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 20. Downgrade to node.js 20.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
